body:
## Purpose 

Introduces GPU-focused performance improvements across the IMEX ARK and IMEX SSPRK timesteppers. It fuses GPU kernels to reduce memory round-trips. In benchmarks, this achieves up to 1.6x speedup on step integrations (but much less in a real model with many internal kernels).

I also tested overlapping Jacobian assembly and first explicit stage kernels for IMEX methods with an explicit first stage, and downcasting IMEX tableaus for type stability in FP32 models with lower-order timesteppers. This made little difference in ClimaAtmos, so I removed it again but left hooks and comments on how to reactivate it when needed. 

Closes #172 and #398.
title: Fusion of timestepping kernels
